dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back — here's your procurement overview

actionRequired.title: Action Required
actionRequired.emptyDesc: No POs require your attention right now.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated on your procurement activities

deliveryNote.title: Create Delivery Note
deliveryNote.clickToUpload: Click to upload a delivery document
deliveryNote.infoBanner: This delivery note notifies stores of an expected receipt. Goods are formally received via the buyer's GRN.
deliveryNote.successBanner: Delivery note submitted successfully. The buyer's stores team will see it as a pending receipt.

account.title: Account & Statement
account.subtitle: Read-only view of your payable status
account.profileNote: GSTIN, PAN and bank details are managed by the buyer's compliance team and can't be edited here.
account.profileSaveError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

catalogue.title: My Catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: Manage your price list for the buying group
catalogue.loadError: Failed to load your catalogue. Please refresh the page.
catalogue.noVendorNotice: Catalogue management is available to supplier accounts only. You're signed in as internal staff, which has no vendor — please sign in with a supplier account to manage a catalogue.
catalogue.toastSubmitError: Failed to submit catalogue. Please try again.
catalogue.submitTooltip: Submit your catalogue for buyer approval
catalogue.deviationTooltip: Price deviates from agreed rate contract
catalogue.emptyDesc: Add your first item to start building your price list.
catalogue.itemCodeValidation: Item code may only contain letters, numbers, and dashes
catalogue.itemCodeDuplicate: This item code is already in your catalogue
catalogue.descriptionValidation: Description must be {{max}} characters or fewer
catalogue.formNote: Lines are submitted for buyer approval before becoming orderable.

invoiceSubmit.title: Submit Invoice
invoiceSubmit.subtitle: Submit an invoice against a delivered purchase order
invoiceSubmit.matchedMessage: All invoiced values match the expected amounts from PO + GRN.
invoiceSubmit.mismatchPriceHigher: Unit price higher than PO for {{item}} by ₹{{diff}}
invoiceSubmit.matchNote: Invoices that do not match are held and reviewed by Accounts Payable before posting — they are not posted automatically.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: View and respond to purchase orders from your buying entities

excelUpload.title: Bulk Upload Catalogue (Excel)
excelUpload.dropOrClick: Drag a file here, or click to browse
excelUpload.errorEmptyFile: This Excel file has no data rows.
excelUpload.errorCorruptFile: This file could not be read — it may be corrupted or not a valid Excel file.
excelUpload.errorTooManyRows: This file has more than 1000 rows. Please split it into smaller files.
excelUpload.errorParseFailed: Could not process this file. Please check its format and try again.
excelUpload.rowErrorItemCodeDuplicate: Duplicate item code (already in the catalogue or repeated in this file).
excelUpload.rowErrorDescriptionTooLong: Description must be 255 characters or fewer.
excelUpload.rowErrorPriceInvalid: Price must be a positive number.
excelUpload.rowErrorPriceDecimalPlaces: Price must have at most 2 decimal places.
excelUpload.rowErrorCurrencyUnsupported: Currency must be INR or AED.
excelUpload.rowErrorDateFormat: Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
excelUpload.rowErrorDateRange: Validity From must be on or before Validity To.
excelUpload.rowErrorTaxClassUnsupported: Tax Class must be one of GST-0, GST-5, GST-12, GST-18.

login.title: Sign in to Supplier Portal
login.mfaHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
login.resetHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
login.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.resetSentMsg: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent.
login.resetSentHint: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
login.registerHint: Create a supplier portal account to get started.
login.accountCreatedHint: You can now sign in with your email and password.
login.footer: Supplier access portal. For Web Prol'IFIC internal staff, use the
